tasks.subject: imgD1-T1: config knobs
tasks.description:
**Goal:** 5 env-tunable settings (conservative defaults) in app/core/config.py: IMG_DOWNLOAD_CONNECT_TIMEOUT_S=3, IMG_DOWNLOAD_READ_TIMEOUT_S=15, IMG_DOWNLOAD_CAP_S=20, PROCESSING_DEADLINE_S=120, ASYNC_BACKLOG_FACTOR=4 (os.getenv w/ default). No behavior change.

**Verify:** python -m py_compile apps-microservices/image-comparison-service/app/core/config.py. Commit both EN+FR, branch features/poc, no push. Full code in plan T1.

```json:metadata
{"files":["apps-microservices/image-comparison-service/app/core/config.py"],"verifyCommand":"python -m py_compile apps-microservices/image-comparison-service/app/core/config.py","acceptanceCriteria":["5 settings via os.getenv w/ defaults","py_compile clean","no behavior change"]}
```

tasks.subject: imgD1-T2: bounded downloads (image_processor B)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** load_images: granular httpx.Timeout(connect/read/write/pool from settings) ; skip retry on 4xx ; wrap each download in asyncio.wait_for(download_with_retry(inp), settings.IMG_DOWNLOAD_CAP_S) -> per-image TimeoutError -> failed_images via existing return_exceptions=True, no gating.

**Files:** app/core/image_processor.py. **blockedBy:** T1.

**Verify:** python -m py_compile image_processor.py ; smoke (VM) dead-image job <= ~cap. Commit both EN+FR, no push. Full before/after in plan T2.

```json:metadata
{"files":["apps-microservices/image-comparison-service/app/core/image_processor.py"],"verifyCommand":"python -m py_compile apps-microservices/image-comparison-service/app/core/image_processor.py","acceptanceCriteria":["httpx.Timeout granular from settings (not 30.0)","skip retry on 4xx","per-image wait_for(IMG_DOWNLOAD_CAP_S) -> failed_images, no gating","py_compile clean"]}
```

tasks.subject: imgD1-T3: per-job timeout + task-ref (job_manager A2+A3)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Wrap process_job_logic in asyncio.wait_for(settings.PROCESSING_DEADLINE_S) in submit_job_async (_run_and_release) + submit_job_sync ; on asyncio.TimeoutError -> _mark_failed_timeout (status=failed via cache_service.redis_client.set, guarded) ; sync re-raises (router 500). __init__ self._background_tasks=set() ; create_task stored + add_done_callback(discard). process_job_logic UNCHANGED.

**Files:** app/core/job_manager.py. **blockedBy:** T1.

**Verify:** python -m py_compile job_manager.py ; smoke (VM) hung job -> failed at ~deadline, counter >=0. Commit both EN+FR, no push. Full code in plan T3.

```json:metadata
{"files":["apps-microservices/image-comparison-service/app/core/job_manager.py"],"verifyCommand":"python -m py_compile apps-microservices/image-comparison-service/app/core/job_manager.py","acceptanceCriteria":["wait_for(PROCESSING_DEADLINE_S) both submit paths","_mark_failed_timeout helper (guarded set)","sync re-raises","_background_tasks set + add_done_callback","process_job_logic unchanged","py_compile clean"]}
```

tasks.subject: imgD1-T4: async-submit backpressure (comparator D)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** /start sync:false branch: before submit_job_async, if job_manager.local_active_jobs >= settings.MAX_CONCURRENT_JOBS*settings.ASYNC_BACKLOG_FACTOR -> raise HTTPException(503) (mirror sync path). Else unchanged. Docstring updated. settings+status already imported.

**Files:** app/router/comparator.py. **blockedBy:** T1.

**Verify:** python -m py_compile comparator.py ; smoke (VM) flood -> some 503s. Commit both EN+FR, no push. Full before/after in plan T4.

```json:metadata
{"files":["apps-microservices/image-comparison-service/app/router/comparator.py"],"verifyCommand":"python -m py_compile apps-microservices/image-comparison-service/app/router/comparator.py","acceptanceCriteria":["503 when local_active_jobs >= MAX_CONCURRENT_JOBS*ASYNC_BACKLOG_FACTOR","else unchanged 202","py_compile clean"]}
```
